# Gravel God Race Database

> The definitive gravel race database. 735 races rated on 14 criteria, scored 0-100, and tiered 1-4.
> Last generated: 2026-07-18

## Overview

Gravel God is an independent gravel cycling database covering 735 races across North America and beyond. Every race is scored on 14 dimensions (logistics, length, technicality, elevation, climate, altitude, adventure, prestige, race quality, experience, community, field depth, value, expenses) on a 1-5 scale, producing an overall score out of 100 and a tier assignment (T1=elite, T2=strong, T3=solid, T4=developing).

- **Tier 1 (Elite)**: 63 races — score >= 80 or prestige override
- **Tier 2 (Strong)**: 409 races — score >= 60
- **Tier 3 (Solid)**: 186 races — score >= 45
- **Tier 4 (Developing)**: 77 races — score < 45

Disciplines: gravel, MTB, bikepacking.
Regions: Africa, Asia, Europe, Midwest, North America, Northeast, Oceania, Other, South, South America, West.

## Machine-Readable Resources

- [Full LLM context (this database as text)](https://gravelgodcycling.com/llms-full.txt)
- [Race index JSON (735 entries)](https://gravelgodcycling.com/race-index.json)
- [REST API (OpenAPI)](https://gravelgodcycling.com/api/v1/docs)
- [RSS feed](https://gravelgodcycling.com/feed/races.xml)
- [MCP Server (GitHub)](https://github.com/wattgod/gravel-race-automation)
- [Individual race profiles](https://gravelgodcycling.com/race/{slug}/)
- [Markdown profiles](https://gravelgodcycling.com/race/{slug}.md)
- [Race training-plan guides](https://gravelgodcycling.com/race/{slug}/training-plan/)
- [Race prep kits](https://gravelgodcycling.com/race/{slug}/prep-kit/)

## Markdown Mirrors

Every race profile is also published as clean Markdown with YAML
frontmatter, one file per race, at:

`https://gravelgodcycling.com/race/{slug}.md`

e.g. https://gravelgodcycling.com/race/unbound-200.md

## Contact

- Website: https://gravelgodcycling.com
- Email: matt@gravelgodcycling.com
